title: Umaren'k'sa
content:
{{Top|fga|leg}} {{Species |image= |name=Umaren'k'sa |designation=[[Sentience/Legends|Sentient]]{{CSWECite|III|279|Umaren'k'sa}} |class= |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor= |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=Influenced by the [[Hemes Arbora]] |lifespan= |origin=[[Umaren'k]] |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|This one waz tracing the history of a speciez called the Hemes Arbora.''"''
''"''I've never heard of them.''"''
''"''They originally came from here, Carrivar, and migrated to Osseriton here, via Umaren'k. This one detected their influence on the Umaren'k'sa culture.|Saba Sebatyne and Wynssa Fel|''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]''}} The '''Umaren'k'sa''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Umaren'k]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. After another species, the [[Hemes Arbora]], migrated to their world, the Umaren'k'sa adopted much of their visitors' culture, a societal shift that was prompted by the appearance of the sentient planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] in the [[Umaren'k system/Legends|Umaren'k system]]. ==Biology and appearance== The Umaren'k'sa were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings. ==Society and culture== The species hailed from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Umaren'k]] in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]].''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' The Umaren'k'sa adopted many elements of culture from another sentient species, the [[Hemes Arbora]]. ==History== At some point in the Umaren'k'sa's history, the Hemes Arbora—a species from [[Carrivar|another world]]—immigrated to Umaren'k. Shortly thereafter, the sentient planet [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] moved into the [[Umaren'k system/Legends|Umaren'k system]], and the strange appearance caused the Umaren'k'sa to adopt many aspects of Hemes Arbora culture. The Hemes Arbora eventually moved on to the planet [[Osseriton/Legends|Osseriton]]. Another Unknown Regions species, the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]], knew of the Umaren'k'sa and had records of them in their [[Expeditionary Library]] on the planet [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]]. In [[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]], the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Saba Sebatyne]] discovered references to Umaren'k'sa history while looking for information on Zonama Sekot in the Expeditionary [[Library/Legends|Library]]. [[Gender/Legends|She]] surmised that Umaren'k'sa culture had been influenced by the Hemes Arbora after the planet's arrival in their [[Star system/Legends|system]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Umaren'k'sa are mentioned briefly in the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'', written by [[Sean Williams]] and [[Shane Dix]] and published by [[Del Rey]] in [[2003]]. In the novel, the Jedi Knight Saba Sebatyne theorizes about Umaren'k'sa culture; however, the book does not definitively state that the Umaren'k'sa are a unique species. ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], includes an entry on the Umaren'k'sa that explicitly labels them a species and confirms Saba Sebatyne's suppositions about them. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic II: Refugee]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |es=Umaren'k'sa }} [[Category:Unknown Regions sentient species]]
